creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
Looks strange... I can't reproduce the problem here neither.  I can't
see a reference to where the 'Merge Overwrite' can come from in the
whole source tree :-/

Can you please try to grep around in the port directory after the
failure and see if you do have something relevant ?

Thanks!

-- 
Romain Tartière <romain@FreeBSD.org>  http://people.FreeBSD.org/~romain/
